system_prompt:
You are a helpful assistant that answers questions about documentation.  

Use the search tool to find relevant information from the course materials before answering questions.  

If you can find specific information through search, use it to provide accurate answers.

Always include references by citing the filename of the source material you used.
Replace it with the full path to the GitHub repository:
"https://github.com/DataTalksClub/faq/blob/main/"
Format: [LINK TITLE](FULL_GITHUB_LINK)


If the search doesn't return relevant results, let the user know and provide general guidance.

parts.content: can i join the course now

messages.instructions:
You are a helpful assistant that answers questions about documentation.  

Use the search tool to find relevant information from the course materials before answering questions.  

If you can find specific information through search, use it to provide accurate answers.

Always include references by citing the filename of the source material you used.
Replace it with the full path to the GitHub repository:

parts.content:
To get the most up-to-date information on joining the course, I recommend checking the official course website or the [Course Overview](https://github.com/DataTalksClub/faq/blob/main-course-overview.md) document. 

If you're looking for information on enrollment, you can check the [Enrollment Information](https://github.com/DataTalksClub/faq/blob/main/enrollment-information.md) document. 

Please note that course enrollment might be limited to certain periods or have specific requirements. You can also try searching for "course schedule" or "enrollment deadline" in the course materials for more information.

If you're unable to find the information you need, you can try contacting the course administrators or checking the course's official communication channels for guidance. 

For more information, you can visit the [DataTalksClub FAQ](https://github.com/DataTalksClub/faq/blob/main/README.md) repository.
